channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan proposes to host potential US-Iran peace negotiations in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has officially offered Islamabad as a venue for possible negotiations between the United States and Iran to help end the ongoing conflict in West Asia. The initiative, an...

item.title: Oil prices drop while Asian markets rise amid speculation over US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Oil prices dropped by more than 5% on Wednesday, largely due to growing hopes for a de-escalation of tensions between the United States and Iran. Asian stock markets, including Japan’s Nikkei 225, Sou...

item.title: How Nigerian Politicians Use Festivals and Gatherings for Political Moves
item.description: Last weekend, Nigerians dey celebrate Eid el-Fitri, but e no just be celebration as na time politicians dey plan dem next moves for next year election. E don dey common for politicians to hide their w...

item.title: Reflections on Kay Scarpetta and the Evolution of Crime Fiction
item.description: Dr Kay Scarpetta, the fictional chief medical examiner of Virginia, was introduced in Patricia Cornwell’s 1990 crime novel 'Postmortem', inspired by Cornwell’s own experiences as a police reporter and...

item.title: Ocean vs River Cruises: What Aussies Should Know in 2026
item.description: As Australian travellers look ahead to their 2026 holidays, many are weighing the choice between ocean cruising and river cruising. Ocean cruises are massive ships that can hold up to 6,000 passengers...

item.title: Jay-Z opens up about anger and legal battles following dropped sexual assault lawsuit
item.description: Jay-Z has spoken out for the first time about the sexual assault allegations made against him and Sean 'Diddy' Combs in 2024. The rapper revealed that he experienced 'uncontrollable anger' after an an...

item.title: B.C. heli-skiing operations paused following fatal avalanche involving Swiss nationals
item.description: A tragic avalanche in northern British Columbia claimed the lives of three Swiss nationals during a heli-skiing trip on Mount Knauss, approximately 30 kilometres north of Terrace. The group of four wa...

item.title: Twelve Senior SAPS Officers Arrested Over R360m Tender Scandal
item.description: Twelve senior managers from the South African Police Service (SAPS) have been arrested in connection with the controversial awarding of a R360 million tender to Vusi 'Cat' Matlala’s company, Medicare ...

item.title: Justice Salami Questions Legality of Peter Obi’s 2023 Election Candidacy and Criticizes Judiciary Standards
item.description: Former President of the Court of Appeal, Justice Isa Ayo Salami, don talk say Peter Obi no suppose contest the 2023 presidential election under Labour Party because of constitutional wahala wey follow...

item.title: Detailed timeline of the Air Canada crash involving a fire truck at LaGuardia Airport
item.description: The article provides a detailed reconstruction of the tragic collision at New York’s LaGuardia Airport in which an Air Canada Express flight from Montréal crashed into a fire truck. The report, based ...

item.title: Kerala Police directs removal of social media posts on ECI document mistakenly carrying BJP seal
item.description: On 25th March 2026, Kerala Police issued notices to multiple social media users and requested platform X to remove posts circulating an Election Commission of India (ECI) document that erroneously car...

item.title: Pakistan and UNSC Members Reaffirm Opposition to Israeli Settlements in Occupied Palestine
item.description: On March 25, 2026, Pakistan joined seven other UN Security Council members in a unified statement condemning the annexation of any part of the Occupied Palestinian Territory and the forced displacemen...

item.title: Dickson Says PDP Is Collapsing as Jonathan Watches
item.description: Senator Seriake Dickson wey represent Bayelsa West for National Assembly don yan say PDP don turn 'killed and buried' party. The former Bayelsa State Governor talk this one on Channels Television's Po...

item.title: High Court grants Raphael Tuju Sh200,000 anticipatory bond and halts potential arrest
item.description: On Tuesday, March 24, 2026, the High Court granted former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju an anticipatory bond of Sh200,000 with one surety of the same amount. The court also barred the police from arr...

item.title: Court Delays Rivers PDP Leadership Case Until April 14
item.description: A Rivers State High Court in Port Harcourt has postponed the hearing of a case challenging the legitimacy of the PDP leadership in Rivers State to April 14, 2026. The suit was filed by three party mem...

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs Spur Australian Businesses to Offer Petrol Incentives Amid Global Supply Strain
item.description: Australia is facing a worsening fuel crisis driven by surging global oil prices linked to ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Petrol and diesel costs are climbing towards $3 per litre in some areas, ...

item.title: Victoria Chiropractor Faces Suspension for Insurance Fraud
item.description: A Victoria-based chiropractor has been suspended for submitting false insurance claims, according to a recent decision. The chiropractor, who was part of the B.C. health system, reportedly provided fr...

item.title: Comedian Flaqo denies dating rumours with Rongai TikToker Cindi after breakup with Keranta
item.description: Kenyan comedian and content creator Flaqo has come out to deny viral rumours claiming he is dating a TikToker known as Cindi from Rongai. The speculation started after several online users alleged the...

item.title: Survivors describe brutal torture and killings in Sudan’s RSF detention camps
item.description: The report talk about how detainees wey Sudan’s Rapid Support Forces (RSF) arrest for El-Fasher, North Darfur, suffer serious torture and killings. After the RSF take over the city in October, dem loc...

item.title: Evolving Leadership for a Rapidly Changing, AI-Driven World
item.description: In 2026, leadership is transforming rapidly due to technological advances and changing workforce expectations. Companies are moving away from traditional top-down management structures, emphasizing hu...
